description: newapi 监控面板 (对标 Furion 指标映射)

panels.title: 账单记录输入token为0请求数rpm

targets.expr: sum (increase(newapi_relay_token_anomaly_total{token_type="prompt", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (username, model, token_type)
sum (increase(newapi_relay_consume_log_traffic_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, token_type, username)
sum (increase(newapi_relay_consume_log_traffic_failed_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, token_type, username, channel_id)
sum (increase(newapi_relay_consume_log_traffic_success_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, token_type, username)

panels.title: 成功流量 - 账单记录请求数差额

targets.expr: sum (increase(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="success", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, username) - sum (increase(newapi_relay_consume_log_traffic_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, username) != 0

panels.title: 用户每分钟错误率 非5xx

targets.expr: sum(increase(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="error", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id", status_code!~"5.*"}[1m])) by (model, username) / clamp_min(sum(increase(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, username), 1)

sum(increase(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="error", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id", status_code=~"5.*"}[1m])) by (model, username) / clamp_min(sum(increase(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[1m])) by (model, username), 1)
sum by (channel_id, token_type, status_code, error_type, model, username) (rate(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="error", model=~"$model", username=~"$username"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60 > 0

panels.title: 成功请求数每分钟 分渠道ID

targets.expr: sum by (api_type, channel_id, model, username, token_type) (rate(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="success", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

panels.title: 成功请求数每分钟 分tokenname

targets.expr: sum by (token_type, model, username) (rate(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="success", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

panels.title: 用户请求量/min 分渠道
成功请求数每分钟 汇总

targets.expr: sum by (api_type, model, username) (rate(newapi_relay_e2e_requests_total{status="success", model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(newapi_relay_e2e_request_duration_seconds_bucket{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, model, username, channel_id))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum(rate(newapi_relay_e2e_request_duration_seconds_bucket{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, model, username, channel_id))
sum by (group, channel_id, model, api_type, username) (rate(newapi_relay_retry_total{model=~"$model", username=~"$username", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

panels.title: 1m内渠道请求量 - 分供应商
1m内渠道失败请求量 错误类型

targets.expr: sum by (channel_id, error_type, api_type, model) (rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="error", model=~"$model", channel_id=~"$channel_id", status_code!~"2.*"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60 > 0
sum by (channel_id, api_type, model, status_code, username) (rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="success", model=~"$model", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 60

1 - clamp_max( sum(rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{status="error", model=~"$model", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (model, api_type) / sum(rate(newapi_relay_requests_total{model=~"$model", channel_id=~"$channel_id"}[$__rate_interval])) by (model, api_type), 1)

title: newapi 面板 (Furion 对标)
